🌸 Kriti 🌸

Your Cozy Terminal Life OS

Welcome to your brand-new, super cozy digital home right inside your terminal! Kriti is a personal life operating system designed to keep you organized, motivated, and always smiling. Whether you are tracking daily missions, dreaming up your wishlist, or focusing deeply with a Pomodoro timer, Kriti is here to cheer you on every single step of the way! ✨

🎀 What's Inside?

🔥 Streak Tracking

Keep your momentum going and watch your daily streaks grow!

🎯 Missions & Quests

Organize your big goals and daily tasks with perfect ease.

✨ Wishlist

Keep track of all the wonderful things you are saving up for.

🍅 Pomodoro Timer

Stay focused and cozy while getting your important work done.

💬 Chat with Kriti

Talk directly to your AI bestie using Ollama!

🎤 Voice Support

Speak and listen—Kriti has full Text-to-Speech and Speech-to-Text!

🛠️ Getting Ready

To bring Kriti to life on your computer, we just need to gather a few magical ingredients!

# Install the main cozy terminal packages!
pip install blessed requests

# If you want Kriti to talk and listen (Voice Layer):
pip install pyttsx3 pyaudio SpeechRecognition

A tiny note for Mac users: You might need to run brew install portaudio before installing pyaudio! On Windows, it should work like an absolute charm right out of the box. 🌟

🚀 How to Play

Ready to start your adventure? Just open up your terminal, make sure Ollama is happily running, and type:

# Start Ollama first!
OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* ollama serve

# Then, in a new terminal window, wake up Kriti:
python3 kriti.py
